info.name: Mediation Pro - AdMob API Collection
info.description:
Complete AdMob API collection for Mediation optimization platform.

## Setup Instructions

### 1. Create Google Cloud Project
1. Go to https://console.cloud.google.com
2. Create new project or select existing
3. Enable "AdMob API" in API Library

### 2. Create OAuth 2.0 Credentials
1. Go to APIs & Services > Credentials
2. Create OAuth 2.0 Client ID (Web application)
3. Add Postman callback URL: https://oauth.pstmn.io/v1/callback
4. Copy Client ID and Client Secret

### 3. Configure Postman Variables
Set these in Collection Variables:
- `client_id`: Your OAuth Client ID
- `client_secret`: Your OAuth Client Secret
- `publisher_id`: Your AdMob Publisher ID (e.g., pub-1234567890123456)

### 4. Get Access Token
1. Go to Authorization tab
2. Click "Get New Access Token"
3. Complete Google sign-in
4. Use the token for all requests

## API Documentation
- AdMob API: https://developers.google.com/admob/api/v1/getting-started
- Write API (Alpha): Requires allowlist - contact Google rep

item.name: 1. Authentication
item.description: OAuth 2.0 authentication flows for Google APIs

request.description: Exchange authorization code for access token. Use this if you need to manually handle the OAuth flow.
Refresh an expired access token using the refresh token.
Verify the access token and check its scopes and expiration.

item.name: 2. Account & Apps
item.description: APIs to list publisher accounts and apps

request.description:
List all AdMob publisher accounts associated with the authenticated user.

**Response includes:**
- Account name (resource identifier)
- Publisher ID
- Reporting timezone
- Currency code

List all apps in the AdMob account.

**Response includes:**
- App ID (ca-app-pub-xxx~xxx)
- Platform (ANDROID/IOS)
- App store info (name, store ID)
- Manual app info if not linked

List all ad units in the account.

**Response includes:**
- Ad Unit ID
- Ad Unit Name
- App ID
- Ad Format (BANNER, INTERSTITIAL, REWARDED, etc.)

List all available ad sources (networks) for mediation.

**Response includes:**
- Ad Source ID (network identifier)
- Title (display name)
- Whether it supports bidding

**Common Ad Source IDs:**
- AdMob Network: 5450213213286189855
- Pangle: 1022305674882866
- Meta: 1215381445328257
- Unity: 3579388761970597674
- AppLovin: 8298043612981979098

List adapters for a specific ad source.

Used when creating ad unit mappings to get the correct adapter configuration.

**Path parameter:**
- adSourceId: The ad source/network ID (e.g., 5450213213286189855 for AdMob Network)

item.name: 3. Mediation Groups
item.description: APIs to manage mediation groups and their configurations

request.description:
List all mediation groups in the account.

**Response includes:**
- Mediation Group ID
- Display Name
- Targeting (platform, format, ad units, regions)
- State (ENABLED/DISABLED)
- A/B Experiment State
- All mediation lines (bidding + waterfall)

Filter mediation groups by app ID.

**Filter syntax:**
- CONTAINS_ANY(APP_IDS, app_id1, app_id2, ...)
Get details of a specific mediation group including all waterfall and bidding lines.

List all ad unit mappings for a specific ad unit.

Used to get the mapping between primary ad units and network-specific ad units.

item.name: 4. Waterfall Management (Write API)
item.description: APIs to create and update waterfall configurations. **Requires AdMob Write API access (allowlist).**

item.name: List AdMob Network Waterfall Ad Units

request.description:
List all AdMob Network waterfall ad units for the account.

**Response:** adMobNetworkWaterfallAdUnits array with name, admobNetworkWaterfallAdUnitId, displayName, appId, format, adTypes, cpmFloorSettings.globalFloorMicros.

Pagination: use pageToken if nextPageToken is returned.

**⚠️ Requires Write API Access**

Create multiple AdMob Network waterfall ad units in a single batch.

**Request body:**
- appId: The app to create units for
- displayName: Display name for the waterfall line
- format: BANNER, INTERSTITIAL, REWARDED, REWARDED_INTERSTITIAL, APP_OPEN_AD
- adTypes: ["VIDEO"], ["RICH_MEDIA"], or ["VIDEO", "RICH_MEDIA"]
- globalFloorMicros: eCPM in micros (multiply dollars by 1,000,000)

**Example:**
- $25.00 = 25000000 micros
- $10.50 = 10500000 micros

**⚠️ Requires Write API Access**

Update existing AdMob Network waterfall ad units (change floor prices).

**Request body:**
- name: Full resource name of the waterfall ad unit
- displayName: New display name
- globalFloorMicros: New eCPM floor in micros
- updateMask: Fields to update (comma-separated)

**⚠️ Requires Write API Access**

Create mappings between primary ad units and network-specific ad units.

This links the waterfall ad unit you created to your actual ad unit in the mediation group.

**⚠️ Requires Write API Access**

Update a mediation group to add, modify, or remove waterfall lines.

**Key concepts:**
- New lines use negative IDs: "-1", "-2", etc.
- Existing lines use their actual ID: "123", "456"
- To remove a line: set state to "REMOVED"
- To disable: set state to "DISABLED"

**updateMask syntax:**
- Add new: mediationGroupLines["-1"]
- Update existing: mediationGroupLines["123"].cpmMicros
- Remove: mediationGroupLines["123"].state

**⚠️ Requires Write API Access**

Remove a waterfall line from a mediation group by setting its state to REMOVED.

Replace LINE_ID_TO_REMOVE with the actual line ID (e.g., "123").

item.name: 5. A/B Testing
item.description: APIs to manage mediation A/B experiments

request.description: List all A/B experiments in the account.

**⚠️ Requires Write API Access**

Create a new A/B experiment for a mediation group.

**Request body:**
- displayName: Name of the experiment
- treatmentTrafficPercentage: % of traffic to send to treatment (10-90)
- treatmentMediationLines: The waterfall configuration for the treatment variant

**⚠️ Requires Write API Access**

Stop a running A/B experiment and choose which variant to keep.

**variantChoice options:**
- VARIANT_A: Keep the control (original) configuration
- VARIANT_B: Keep the treatment (experiment) configuration

item.name: 6. Reporting & Analytics
item.description: APIs to generate mediation reports for analytics

request.description:
Generate a basic mediation report grouped by date, app, and ad unit.

**Available Dimensions:**
- DATE, MONTH, WEEK
- APP, AD_UNIT, AD_SOURCE, AD_SOURCE_INSTANCE
- COUNTRY, FORMAT, PLATFORM
- MEDIATION_GROUP

**Available Metrics:**
- ESTIMATED_EARNINGS
- IMPRESSIONS, CLICKS, IMPRESSION_CTR
- MATCHED_REQUESTS, MATCH_RATE
- OBSERVED_ECPM

Generate report grouped by ad source (network) and ad source instance (waterfall line).

Useful for analyzing which networks are performing best.

Generate report grouped by country, format, and platform.

Useful for analyzing geographic performance differences.

item.name: Generate Mediation Report - By Mediation Group

request.description:
Generate report for a specific mediation group with breakdown by ad source instance (waterfall line).

Useful for analyzing waterfall performance and calculating Share of Wallet (SoW).

item.name: Generate Mediation Report - Last 7 Days Summary

request.description:
Generate a summary report for the last 7 days with no dimension breakdown (account totals only).

Useful for dashboard KPI cards.

item.name: 7. Network Configuration
item.description: Example API structures for third-party network integrations (not part of AdMob API)

request.description:
**Reference only - requires Pangle API access**

List applications in your Pangle account to get App IDs for ad unit creation.

**Reference only - requires Pangle API access**

Create a new placement (ad unit) in Pangle with specified floor price.

**Reference only - requires InMobi API access**

List placements for an InMobi application.

**Reference only - requires Mintegral API access**

List ad units for a Mintegral application.

Utility request to convert eCPM from micros to dollars.

Edit the Pre-request Script to convert values.

**Conversion:**
- Micros to Dollars: micros / 1,000,000
- Dollars to Micros: dollars * 1,000,000

**Examples:**
- $25.00 = 25,000,000 micros
- $10.50 = 10,500,000 micros
- $0.50 = 500,000 micros

exec: // Set the dollar amount you want to convert

request.description:
Utility request to convert eCPM from dollars to micros.

Edit the dollar amount in the Pre-request Script.

item.name: Full Workflow - Get MG Details with Performance

exec: console.log('=== FULL WORKFLOW TO GET MG DETAILS ===');
console.log('   -> Group by AD_SOURCE_INSTANCE for SoW calculation');
console.log('   -> For each line, calculate SoW = line_revenue / total_revenue');
console.log('   -> Apply optimization rules based on SoW and match_rate');

request.description:
This is a documentation request that outlines the full workflow for getting mediation group details with performance data.

Run this request and check the Console for the workflow steps.
